name: othello-gpt
license_evidence: cardData.license='mit' via HF API; README.md YAML front-matter has 'license: mit'. (Chosen over awonga/* Othello repos which have NO license tag, and over mntss/Othello-GPT which is also MIT but ships two redundant .pth files.) NeelNanda/Othello-GPT-Transformer-Lens has NO license tag.
architecture: minGPT (Othello world-model GPT), 8 layers, d_model=512, 8 heads, n_ctx=59, vocab=61 (board-square tokens), d_mlp=2048
quant: int4 (group=64, row-wise symmetric) size headliner; int8 (group=128) fidelity option. attn.mask causal buffers dropped (runtime regenerates).
runtime: minGPT forward pass. 61-token Othello board vocab is positional (no tokenizer file; squares 0-60). config.json carries dims. No full WASM built; runtime is a nanoGPT/minGPT-style forward stub. Causal mask regenerated at load (was stripped from bundle).
compression: xz -9e (LZMA2) over [quantized packed weights + fp16 scales + fp16 LN/bias/pos_emb + config.json]
notes: Othello world-model GPT (the famous emergent-board-state model). int4 on-tape 11.56 MB; but int4 mean-rel quant error is 0.31 (wide weight dynamic range at 25M params) which risks degrading the learned board representation -- int8 at 24 MB (relerr 0.033) is the fidelity-safe ship. Recommend int8 as the shippable headliner, int4 as the aggressive-size variant. torch.load uses weights_only=True (no arbitrary-code unpickle).
